'''chavoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zad|zad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zad|zad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chavoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæveyeth|chæveyeth]] || [[word:chæveyej|chæveyej]] || [[word:chæveyesh|chæveyesh]] || [[word:chæveye|chæveye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavovoyoth|chavovoyoth]] || [[word:chavovoyoj|chavovoyoj]] || [[word:chavovoyosh|chavovoyosh]] || [[word:chavovoyo|chavovoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavoyoth|chavoyoth]] || [[word:chavoyoj|chavoyoj]] || [[word:chavoyosh|chavoyosh]] || [[word:chavoyo|chavoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavofyoth|chavofyoth]] || [[word:chavofyoj|chavofyoj]] || [[word:chavofyosh|chavofyosh]] || [[word:chavofyof|chavofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chavoyotho|chavoyotho]] || [[word:chavoyojo|chavoyojo]] || [[word:chavoyosho|chavoyosho]] || [[word:chavoyoko|chavoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chavoyoth|chavoyoth]] || [[word:chavoyoj|chavoyoj]] || [[word:chavoyosh|chavoyosh]] || [[word:chavoyo|chavoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chavoyothol|chavoyothol]] || [[word:chavoyojol|chavoyojol]] || [[word:chavoyoshol|chavoyoshol]] || [[word:chavoyokol|chavoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chavoyothotho|chavoyothotho]] || [[word:chavoyojojo|chavoyojojo]] || [[word:chavoyoshosho|chavoyoshosho]] || [[word:chavoyoko|chavoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chavoyothon|chavoyothon]] || [[word:chavoyojon|chavoyojon]] || [[word:chavoyoshon|chavoyoshon]] || [[word:chavoyokon|chavoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chavoyothoro|chavoyothoro]] || [[word:chavoyojoro|chavoyojoro]] || [[word:chavoyoshoro|chavoyoshoro]] || [[word:chavoyokoro|chavoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
